popularStory.headline: Short  biography
popularStory.description:
Thomas Howard, 4th Duke of Norfolk, KG (10 March 1536 – 2 June 1572) was an English nobleman and politician.
Norfolk was the son of the poet Henry Howard, Earl of Surrey. He was taught as a child by J …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Howard, 4th Duke Of Norfolk於1536年3月10日出生在英國波藍德可比 卡素時，他的父親Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Duke19歲，母親Frances de Vere19歲。他於1555年3月30日與Mary FitzAlan在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1554年被列為earl marshal of england。他去世於1572年6月2日在英國英格蘭希迪 本 倫敦享年36歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦堂爾 哈姆勒次。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Howard, 4th Duke Of Norfolk于1536年3月10日出生在英国波藍德可比 卡素时，他的父亲Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Duke19岁，母亲Frances de Vere19岁。他于1555年3月30日与Mary FitzAlan在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1554年被列为earl marshal of england。他去世于1572年6月2日在英国英格兰希迪 本 倫敦享年36岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦堂爾 哈姆勒次。

nameMeanings.name: Howard,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Middle English personal names Huward (also Howard) and Heward, from Old French Huard (itself from ancient Germanic Hugihard, hugi- ‘mind, understanding, spirit’ + hard- ‘hardy, bold’). As Hugh appears in Middle English as both How and Hew, this is the definite origin of Heward and a source of Howard. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Hugh .

English: from the Middle English personal name Haward or Howard, usually an Anglicized form of Old Danish Hāwarth (Old Norse Hávarthr, from há ‘high’ + varthr ‘guard, guardian, warden’). Alternation between Haward and Howard may have led to later confusion with Hayward .
English: occasionally a variant of   Ewart   2.

variants.name: Fogarty
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, James Patrick, Kieran, Seamus, Siobhan.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Fógartaigh ‘son of Fógartach’, a personal name from fógartha ‘proclaimed, banished, outlawed’. It is sometimes Anglicized as Howard .

variants.name: Huggard
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the medieval personal name Hugard, a variant of Huard (see Howard ). This surname is also established in Ireland (Kerry).

variants.name: Hayward
meanings: occupational name from Middle English hayward ‘keeper of the hedges and enclosures’ (Old English hēgweard), a manorial officer in charge of the common fields who protected corn and hay from cattle, theft, or damage, and supervised the harvest.

variants.name: Huard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Adelard, Jacques, Jean-Pierre, Lucien, Marcel, Alcide, Amiee, Armand, Aurele, Clermont, Fernard.
French and Channel Islands (Jersey): from the Old French personal name Huart, either identical in origin with Howard 1 or a pet form of Old French Hue .
History: Jean Huard from Courson-Monteloup in Essonne, France, married Anne-Marie Amiot in Quebec City, QC, in 1670.

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Howard, 4th Duke Of Norfolk was born on 10 March 1536, in Corby Castle, Cumberland, England, his father, Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Duke, was 19 and his mother, Frances de Vere, was 19. He married Mary FitzAlan on 30 March 1555, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. In 1554, his occupation is listed as earl marshal of england. He died on 2 June 1572, in City of London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36, and was buried in Tower Hamlets, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Howard, 4th Duke Of Norfolk est né le 10 mars 1536, à Corby Castle, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Duke, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Frances de Vere, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Mary FitzAlan le 30 mars 1555, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. En 1554, sa profession de son indiquée est earl marshal of england. Il est décédé le 2 juin 1572, à City of London, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Tower Hamlets, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Howard, 4th Duke Of Norfolk am 10. März 1536 in Corby Castle, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Duke 19 und seine Mutter Frances de Vere 19. Er hat am 30. März 1555 in England Mary FitzAlan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. 1554 ist sein Beruf als earl marshal of england aufgeführt. Er starb am 2. Juni 1572 im Alter von 36 Jahren in City of London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Tower Hamlets, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Howard, 4th Duke Of Norfolkが1536年3月10日にイギリスクウンバーランドコルビー カストルで生まれた時，父Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Dukeは19歳，母Frances de Vereは19歳であった。1555年3月30日にイギリスでMary FitzAlanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1554年，職業はearl marshal of englandと記録されている。彼は1572年6月2日にイギリスイギリスシトイ オフ ロンドンで36歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドントウエル ハムレツにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Howard, 4th Duke Of Norfolk(이)가 1536년 3월 10일 영국 c벌랜드 코르비 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Duke(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Frances de Vere(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1555년 3월 30일 영국에서 Mary FitzAlan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1554년, 그의 직업은 earl marshal of england이었다. 그는 1572년 6월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 시티 프 런던에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 타워 함레츠에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Howard, 4th Duke Of Norfolk nasceu em 10 de março de 1536, em Corby Castle, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Duke, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Frances de Vere, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary FitzAlan em 30 de março de 1555, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Em 1554, sua profissão aparece como earl marshal of england. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Howard, 4th Duke Of Norfolk родился 10 марта 1536 г. в местности корби кастл, кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Duke было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Frances de Vere, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary FitzAlan 30 марта 1555 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1554 году он работал по профессии earl marshal of england. Он умер 2 июня 1572 г. в местности сити оф лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности тоуир хамлец, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Howard, 4th Duke Of Norfolk nació el 10 de marzo de 1536, en Corby Castle, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Duke, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Frances de Vere, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Mary FitzAlan el 30 de marzo de 1555, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. En 1554, su ocupación registrada era earl marshal of england. Murió el 2 de junio de 1572, en City of London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultado en Tower Hamlets, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
